creator: vazquez@iqm.unicamp.br
text:
The makefiles 

	/usr/share/examples/sunrpc/Makefile
	/usr/share/examples/sunrpc/dir/Makefile
	/usr/share/examples/sunrpc/msg/Makefile 
	/usr/share/examples/sunrpc/sort/Makefile

define the RPC library as:

LIB=-lrpclib

instead of

LIB=

Fix: 

Remove -lrpclib from the makefiles
How-To-Repeat: 
	Just type make
